ast.name: content
ast.source:
Translate {} into Chinese:
    1. Preserve the meaning and tone
    2. Maintain appropriate cultural context
    3. Keep formatting and structure
    Return only the translated text.
ast.target:
将 {} 翻译成中文：
    1. 保留含义和语气
    2. 保持适当的文化背景
    3. 保持格式和结构
    仅返回翻译后的文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Create a bullet-point summary of {}. Each bullet point should capture a key point. Return only the bullet-point summary.
ast.target: 创建 {} 的要点摘要。每个要点应抓住一个关键点。仅返回要点摘要。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Simplify {} to a 6th-grade reading level (ages 11-12). Use simple sentences, common words, and clear explanations. Maintain the original key concepts. Return only the simplified text.
ast.target: 将 {} 简化为六年级阅读水平（11-12岁）。使用简单句子、常用词汇和清晰解释。保留原始关键概念。仅返回简化文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
Explain {} in simple terms that a 5-year-old would understand:
    1. Use basic vocabulary
    2. Include simple analogies
    3. Break down complex concepts
    Return only the simplified explanation.
ast.target:
用五岁孩子能理解的简单术语解释 {}：
    1. 使用基础词汇
    2. 包含简单类比
    3. 分解复杂概念
    仅返回简化的解释。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
Expand {} to twice its length by:
    1. Adding relevant details and examples
    2. Elaborating on key points
    3. Maintaining the original tone and style
    Return only the expanded text.
ast.target:
将{}扩展至原长度的两倍，方法如下：
    1. 添加相关细节和示例
    2. 详细阐述关键点
    3. 保持原文语气和风格
    仅返回扩展后的文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Generate a hierarchical table of contents for {}. Use appropriate heading levels (H1, H2, H3, etc.). Include page numbers if present. Return only the table of contents.
ast.target: 为{}生成一个分层的目录。使用适当的标题级别（H1, H2, H3等）。如果存在页码则包含页码。仅返回目录。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Create a glossary of important terms, concepts, and phrases from {}. Format each entry as "Term: Definition". Sort entries alphabetically. Return only the glossary.
ast.target: 从{}中创建重要术语、概念和短语的词汇表。每个条目格式为“术语：定义”。按字母顺序排序条目。仅返回词汇表。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
Convert {} into a Twitter thread following these rules:
    1. Each tweet must be under 240 characters
    2. Start with "THREAD START" on its own line
    3. Separate tweets with "

---

"
    4. End with "THREAD END" on its own line
    5. Make content engaging and clear
    Return only the formatted thread.
ast.target:
按照以下规则将{}转换为Twitter话题串：
    1. 每条推文不得超过240个字符
    2. 以单独一行的“THREAD START”开头
    3. 用“

---

”分隔推文
    4. 以单独一行的“THREAD END”结尾
    5. 内容要引人入胜且清晰
    仅返回格式化后的话题串。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Manage your projects with different contexts and configurations.

ast.target: 美国西部（加利福尼亚北部）

ast.source: AWS SDK for JavaScript Sts Client for Node.js, Browser and React Native
ast.target: 适用于 Node.js、浏览器和 React Native 的 AWS SDK for JavaScript STS 客户端

ast.name: description
ast.source: Request to replace sections of content in an existing file using SEARCH/REPLACE blocks that define exact changes to specific parts of the file. This tool should be used when you need to make targeted changes to specific parts of a LARGE file.
ast.target: 请求使用 SEARCH/REPLACE 块替换现有文件中的内容部分，这些块定义了文件特定部分的精确更改。当您需要对大文件的特定部分进行针对性更改时，应使用此工具。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the file tree as a nested structure of folders and files
ast.target: 以文件夹和文件的嵌套结构获取文件树

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for notes using lexical/keyword-based search
ast.target: 使用词法/基于关键字的搜索来搜索笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for notes based on the time range and query
ast.target: 根据时间范围和查询搜索笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Index the vault to the Copilot index
ast.target: 将库索引到 Copilot 索引

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current time in local timezone or at a specified UTC offset. Returns epoch time, ISO string, and formatted strings.
ast.target: 获取本地时区或指定 UTC 偏移量的当前时间。返回纪元时间、ISO 字符串和格式化字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert natural language time expressions to date ranges for use with localSearch
ast.target: 将自然语言时间表达式转换为日期范围，以便与 localSearch 一起使用

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a Unix timestamp (in seconds or milliseconds) to detailed time information
ast.target: 将Unix时间戳（以秒或毫秒为单位）转换为详细的时间信息

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start a Pomodoro timer with a customizable interval
ast.target: 启动一个可自定义间隔的番茄钟计时器

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a specific time from one timezone to another using UTC offsets
ast.target: 使用UTC偏移量将特定时间从一个时区转换到另一个时区

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get transcripts of YouTube videos when the user provides YouTube URLs
ast.target: 当用户提供YouTube视频链接时，获取视频字幕

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the transcript of a YouTube video

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current time in any timezone
ast.target: 获取任意时区的当前时间

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert epoch timestamp to human-readable format
ast.target: 将纪元时间戳转换为人类可读的格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert time expressions to date ranges
ast.target: 将时间表达式转换为日期范围

ast.name: description

ast.source: Create or modify files in your vault

ast.source: Make targeted changes to existing files using SEARCH/REPLACE blocks
ast.target: 使用搜索/替换块对现有文件进行针对性更改

ast.name: description
ast.source: Briefly describe the purpose and goals of the project
ast.target: 简要描述项目的目标和宗旨

ast.name: description
ast.source: Custom instructions for how the AI should behave in this project context
ast.target: 关于AI在此项目上下文中应如何行为的自定义指令

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define patterns to include specific files, folders or tags (specified in the note property) in the project context.
ast.target: 定义模式以在项目上下文中包含特定文件、文件夹或标签（在笔记属性中指定）

ast.target: 存储自定义提示的文件夹

ast.target: 处理提示中的变量，如{activenote}、{foldername}或{#tag}。对于原始提示请禁用。

ast.target: 斜杠命令菜单提示的排序顺序

ast.name: description

ast.target: 调试模式会将一些调试信息记录到控制台。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the currently selected model to model List. After adding, please check the Model Tab.
ast.target: 将当前选中的模型添加到模型列表。添加后，请检查模型标签页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where to open the plugin

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default folder name where chat conversations will be saved. Default is 'copilot/copilot-conversations'
ast.target: 聊天记录保存的默认文件夹名称。默认值为'copilot/copilot-conversations'

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default tag to be used when saving a conversation. Default is 'ai-conversations'
ast.target: 保存对话时使用的默认标签。默认值为'ai-conversations'

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically saves the chat after every user message and AI response.
ast.target: 在每条用户消息和AI响应后自动保存聊天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, uses an AI model to generate a concise title for saved chat notes. When disabled, uses the first 10 words of the first user message.
ast.target: 启用后，使用AI模型为保存的聊天笔记生成简洁标题。禁用时，则使用第一条用户消息的前10个单词。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically include the current note in the chat context menu by default when sending messages to the AI.
ast.target: 默认在向AI发送消息时，自动将当前笔记包含在聊天上下文菜单中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show suggested prompts in the chat view
ast.target: 在聊天视图中显示建议提示

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show relevant notes in the chat view
ast.target: 在聊天视图中显示相关笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of reasoning iterations the autonomous agent can perform. Higher values allow for more complex reasoning but may take longer.
ast.target: 自主代理可以执行的最大推理迭代次数。数值越高允许更复杂的推理，但可能需要更长时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable autonomous agent mode in Plus chat. The AI will reason step-by-step and decide which tools to use automatically, improving response quality for complex queries.
ast.target: 在Plus聊天中启用自主代理模式。AI将逐步推理并自动决定使用哪些工具，从而提高复杂查询的响应质量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Suggest completions for partially typed words based on your vault's content. Requires at least 3 characters to trigger.
ast.target: 根据你的知识库内容为部分输入的单词建议补全。至少需要输入3个字符才能触发。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rebuild the word index to include new words from your vault. The index is automatically built when the plugin loads.
ast.target: 重建单词索引以包含知识库中的新词。该索引在插件加载时自动构建。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow the AI to access relevant notes to provide more relevant suggestions. When off, the AI can only see the current note context.
ast.target: 允许AI访问相关笔记以提供更相关的建议。关闭时，AI只能看到当前笔记上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter OpenAI Organization ID if applicable

ast.name: description
ast.source: This is your actual model, no need to pass a model name separately.
ast.target: 这是您的实际模型，无需单独传递模型名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leave it blank, unless you are using a proxy.
ast.target: 留空即可，除非您正在使用代理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The number of previous conversation turns to include in the context. Default is 15 turns, i.e. 30 messages.
ast.target: 包含在上下文中的先前对话轮数。默认值为15轮，即30条消息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, AI responses will include footnote-style citations within the text and numbered sources at the end (This is an experimental feature and may not work as expected for all models.)
ast.target: 启用后，AI响应将在文本中包含脚注式引用，并在末尾列出编号来源（这是一个实验性功能，可能并非对所有模型都如预期正常工作。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Copilot goes through your vault to find relevant notes and passes the top N to the LLM. Default for N is 15. Increase if you want more notes included in the answer generation step.
ast.target: Copilot会扫描您的库以查找相关笔记，并将前N条传递给LLM。N的默认值为15。如果您希望在答案生成步骤中包含更多笔记，请增加此数值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of partitions for Copilot index. Default is 1. Increase if you have issues indexing large vaults. Warning: Changes require clearing and rebuilding the index!
ast.target: Copilot索引的分区数。默认值为1。如果索引大型库时遇到问题，请增加此数值。警告：更改需要清除并重新构建索引！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable folder and graph-based relevance boosts for lexical search results. When disabled, provides pure keyword-based relevance scoring without folder or connection-based adjustments.
ast.target: 对词汇搜索结果启用基于文件夹和图的相关性提升。禁用时，提供纯基于关键词的相关性评分，不进行基于文件夹或连接的调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, Copilot index won't be loaded on mobile devices to save resources. Only chat mode will be available. Any existing index from desktop sync will be preserved. Uncheck to enable QA modes on mobile.
ast.target: 启用后，为了节省资源，Copilot索引不会在移动设备上加载。仅聊天模式可用。来自桌面同步的任何现有索引将被保留。取消选中以在移动设备上启用问答模式。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid Configuration: FIPS and custom endpoint are not supported
ast.target: 配置无效：不支持FIPS和自定义端点

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid Configuration: Dualstack and custom endpoint are not supported
ast.target: 配置无效：不支持Dualstack和自定义端点

ast.source: FIPS and DualStack are enabled, but this partition does not support one or both
ast.target: 已启用FIPS和DualStack，但此分区不支持其中之一或两者

ast.source: FIPS is enabled but this partition does not support FIPS
ast.target: 已启用FIPS，但此分区不支持FIPS

ast.name: error

ast.target: 已启用DualStack，但此分区不支持DualStack

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected: neither Buffer nor TextDecoder are available as globals. Please report this error.
ast.target: 意外情况：全局环境中既没有 Buffer 也没有 TextDecoder。请报告此错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Please specify CO_API_KEY when instantiating the client.
ast.target: 请在使用客户端实例化时指定 CO_API_KEY。

ast.name: message
ast.source: expected a Blob, File or Blob-like object
ast.target: 期望一个 Blob、File 或类 Blob 对象。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Tool executed but returned no result
ast.target: 工具已执行但未返回任何结果。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid input: User message must be a string
ast.target: 无效输入：用户消息必须是字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: No YouTube URLs found in the user prompt. URLs must be in the user prompt instead of the context notes.
ast.target: 用户提示中未找到YouTube网址。网址必须放在用户提示中，而不是上下文注释中。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Transcript not available. Only English videos with auto transcript enabled are supported
ast.target: 转录不可用。仅支持启用了自动转录的英文视频。

ast.name: message
ast.source: An error occurred while transcribing the YouTube video

ast.name: message
ast.source: Transcript not available. Only English videos with the auto transcript option turned on are supported at the moment
ast.target: 转录不可用。目前仅支持开启了自动转录选项的英文视频。

ast.name: message

regex.source: description:"Folder where custom prompts are stored"
regex.target: description:"Folder where custom prompts are stored"

regex.source: description:"Process variables like {activenote}, {foldername}, or {#tag} in prompts. Disable for raw prompts."
regex.target: description:"Process variables like {activenote}, {foldername}, or {#tag} in prompts. Disable for raw prompts."

regex.source: description:"Sort order for slash command menu prompts"
regex.target: description:"Sort order for slash command menu prompts"

regex.source: description:"Enable encryption for the API keys."
regex.target: description:"Enable encryption for the API keys."

regex.source: description:"Debug mode will log some debug message to the console."
regex.target: description:"Debug mode will log some debug message to the console."

regex.source: description:`Open the Copilot log file (${Nf.getLogPath()}) for easy sharing when reporting issues.`
regex.target: description:`Open the Copilot log file (${Nf.getLogPath()}) for easy sharing when reporting issues.`

regex.source: description:"Add the currently selected model to model List. After adding, please check the Model Tab."
regex.target: description:"Add the currently selected model to model List. After adding, please check the Model Tab."

regex.source: description:"Choose where to open the plugin"
regex.target: description:"Choose where to open the plugin"

regex.source: description:"The default folder name where chat conversations will be saved. Default is 'copilot/copilot-conversations'"
regex.target: description:"The default folder name where chat conversations will be saved. Default is 'copilot/copilot-conversations'"

regex.source: description:"The default tag to be used when saving a conversation. Default is 'ai-conversations'"
regex.target: description:"The default tag to be used when saving a conversation. Default is 'ai-conversations'"

regex.source: description:"Automatically saves the chat after every user message and AI response."
regex.target: description:"Automatically saves the chat after every user message and AI response."

regex.source: description:"When enabled, uses an AI model to generate a concise title for saved chat notes. When disabled, uses the first 10 words of the first user message."
regex.target: description:"When enabled, uses an AI model to generate a concise title for saved chat notes. When disabled, uses the first 10 words of the first user message."

regex.source: description:"Automatically include the current note in the chat context menu by default when sending messages to the AI."
regex.target: description:"Automatically include the current note in the chat context menu by default when sending messages to the AI."

regex.source: description:"Show suggested prompts in the chat view"
regex.target: description:"Show suggested prompts in the chat view"

regex.source: description:"Show relevant notes in the chat view"
regex.target: description:"Show relevant notes in the chat view"

regex.source: description:"Maximum number of reasoning iterations the autonomous agent can perform. Higher values allow for more complex reasoning but may take longer."
regex.target: description:"Maximum number of reasoning iterations the autonomous agent can perform. Higher values allow for more complex reasoning but may take longer."

regex.source: description:"Enable autonomous agent mode in Plus chat. The AI will reason step-by-step and decide which tools to use automatically, improving response quality for complex queries."
regex.target: description:"Enable autonomous agent mode in Plus chat. The AI will reason step-by-step and decide which tools to use automatically, improving response quality for complex queries."

regex.source: description:"Suggest completions for partially typed words based on your vault's content. Requires at least 3 characters to trigger."
regex.target: description:"Suggest completions for partially typed words based on your vault's content. Requires at least 3 characters to trigger."

regex.source: description:"Rebuild the word index to include new words from your vault. The index is automatically built when the plugin loads."
regex.target: description:"Rebuild the word index to include new words from your vault. The index is automatically built when the plugin loads."

regex.source: description:"Allow the AI to access relevant notes to provide more relevant suggestions. When off, the AI can only see the current note context."
regex.target: description:"Allow the AI to access relevant notes to provide more relevant suggestions. When off, the AI can only see the current note context."

regex.source: description:"Enter OpenAI Organization ID if applicable"
regex.target: description:"Enter OpenAI Organization ID if applicable"

regex.source: description:"This is your actual model, no need to pass a model name separately."
regex.target: description:"This is your actual model, no need to pass a model name separately."

regex.source: description:"Leave it blank, unless you are using a proxy."
regex.target: description:"Leave it blank, unless you are using a proxy."

regex.source: description:"The number of previous conversation turns to include in the context. Default is 15 turns, i.e. 30 messages."
regex.target: description:"The number of previous conversation turns to include in the context. Default is 15 turns, i.e. 30 messages."

regex.source: description:"When enabled, AI responses will include footnote-style citations within the text and numbered sources at the end (This is an experimental feature and may not work as expected for all models.)"
regex.target: description:"When enabled, AI responses will include footnote-style citations within the text and numbered sources at the end (This is an experimental feature and may not work as expected for all models.)"

regex.source: description:"Copilot goes through your vault to find relevant notes and passes the top N to the LLM. Default for N is 15. Increase if you want more notes included in the answer generation step."
regex.target: description:"Copilot goes through your vault to find relevant notes and passes the top N to the LLM. Default for N is 15. Increase if you want more notes included in the answer generation step."

regex.source: description:"Number of partitions for Copilot index. Default is 1. Increase if you have issues indexing large vaults. Warning: Changes require clearing and rebuilding the index!"
regex.target: description:"Number of partitions for Copilot index. Default is 1. Increase if you have issues indexing large vaults. Warning: Changes require clearing and rebuilding the index!"

regex.source: description:"Enable folder and graph-based relevance boosts for lexical search results. When disabled, provides pure keyword-based relevance scoring without folder or connection-based adjustments."
regex.target: description:"Enable folder and graph-based relevance boosts for lexical search results. When disabled, provides pure keyword-based relevance scoring without folder or connection-based adjustments."

regex.source: description:"When enabled, Copilot index won't be loaded on mobile devices to save resources. Only chat mode will be available. Any existing index from desktop sync will be preserved. Uncheck to enable QA modes on mobile."
regex.target: description:"When enabled, Copilot index won't be loaded on mobile devices to save resources. Only chat mode will be available. Any existing index from desktop sync will be preserved. Uncheck to enable QA modes on mobile."
